Copy Trading
This is a service that allows you to automatically copy market positions of experienced traders in real time.
Go to Copy Trading
For traders
create and maintain their own strategies in OnFin Copy Trading
Traders (strategy managers) buy and sell assets profitably, so they receive additional reward from their subscribers.

A list of the best strategies is generated in real time on the service main page.
For investors
choose and subscribe to strategies from the list
Everything strategy managers do will be copied into subscribers' accounts in real time.

Investors don't have to worry about trading: the manager takes care of all the trades.
OnFin Copy Trading features
OnFin Copy Trading has advanced settings and features for convenient strategy management and subscriptions.
For Investors
Take full advantage of professionals' expertise
Start Copying
Compare strategies, profitability, and fees to select what suits you best.
Choose the Best
OnFin Copy Trading — the simplest way to use traders' expert knowledge into practice.
Expert Knowledge
You can subscribe to one or several strategies, as well as close trades and open new ones.
Funds control
Invest in the strategies of professionals and get the same profit.
Save time
5 Steps to Get Started with Investing
Apply expertise to your account in 5 steps:
Earn profit
Choose a strategy
On the OnFin Copy Trading service main page, you can select a strategy
Earn profit every time the strategy manager makes a profitable trade
Commission
The manager's commission will be automatically withdrawn from your account for subscribing to the strategy
Open a COPY account
And deposit as little as $100
Configure the investment
Configure and subscribe to your chosen strategy
5
1
4
2
3
Determine the amount of your investment and how you want to divide it among strategies. Check the recommended investment amount for each strategy.
You can open several subscriptions for strategies at the same time on one account, or you can divide a certain amount for each strategy between different COPY accounts.
You can open up to 30 subscriptions on one account.
How to choose a strategy
OnFin Copy Trading contains strategies with different profitability, number of subscribers and volume of managed money.
The experience of the manager can be seen by the age of the strategy.
You can estimate the level of risk based on the maximum drawdown.
Maximum drawdown.
-7%
5% from each profitable trade
Investment Terms
Manager's Compensation
Age
990 d
Please note that each strategy manager sets its type and level of fees.
1
2
3
1
2
3
How to set up a subscription
Monitor your investments on the "My Subscriptions" page
You can manage and keep track of your subscriptions on the My Subscriptions page, where they are grouped by account. Here you can pause the copying of strategies.
You only need to make sure that your account has enough funds to execute trades for all connected strategies, otherwise new trades will not be copied.
Click "Copy" on the selected strategy and choose an account for copying
After copying, the lot size is automatically determined by the ratio of funds on the investor's account to the funds on the manager's account.
Don't forget about the fees.
Investing in a strategy on OnFin Copy Trading does not incur any special fees, except for the manager's compensation.
Also, the usual brokerage commission is deducted when making trades on the strategies.
Fixed amount per trade
Sum for a certain period
Percent of profit
The investment terms are specified in the list of strategies and on the page of each individual strategy.
When you activate a strategy with a commission per period, you need to have enough funds in your account to pay the commission, in addition to the minimum deposit of 100 USD.
For Professional Traders
Get additional bonuses for your expert knowledge.
and earn regular rewards
Open your strategy on OnFin Copy Trading and earn regular rewards
Open your strategy on OnFin Copy Trading
Become a strategy manager
The strategy account should not contain active subscriptions for other strategies.
You must not share information about yourself and your trading style with your subscribers.
One account works for only one strategy.
Low spreads
260+ trading instruments
leverage of
up to 1:1000
Instant trades and copying
Discover your own trading strategy in 5 steps:
Open a COPY account
You can open an account and select the account type in the OnFin personal area
1
Open the strategy
Open the strategy by clicking the button on the My Strategies page. Choose the available account and set up one of the three types of commission
2
Name your strategy
Name your strategy, so subscribers understand what you are focusing on in trading. Specify the recommended investment amount for your strategy
3
Fund your account and start trading
Fund your account and start trading according to your expert vision. There are no minimum or maximum deposit limits for your strategy: trade as you see fit
4
Earn profit
Earn profit not only from trades, but also from each subscriber
5
Better conditions mean more subscribers
The longer your account's trading history is and the more information you provide to your subscribers, the more likely you are to gain enough followers.
You can set up any convenient form of compensation, but try to offer fairly attractive terms to your subscribers.
Bonus up to 100% upon registration*
Sign Up Now
Get access to professional tools for successful trading
* Terms of granting bonus funds

Service Regulations
About the Broker
We provide instant interaction with liquidity providers worldwide, allowing traders to make key decisions independently or follow proven, successful strategies. This is true ECN – and a true broker.
OnFin is a broker for traders and investors who value the best conditions and financial freedom. Established in 2015, we continuously improve our services and offerings to make advanced market tools and technologies accessible to everyone.

investment strategies
1:1000
available
leverage

stable operation

top trading instruments
﻿Always on the Customer Support Team's protection
If something went wrong, don't hesitate to contact Customer Support. We're always ready to help.
We are getting better every day
OnFin Copy Trading service will grow and become more and more comfortable every day. We continue to work on the quality of our services. If you have any ideas, suggestions and comments - feel free to share them with us!
﻿Customize your experience
We have collected unique possibilities for trade copying customization. Find the perfect combination of settings to suit your trading style.
﻿Perfect conditions for trading and investing
Spreads, commissions and requotes will no longer interfere with good returns. There are no more barriers between you and your trading success!
﻿You can be both a manager and a subscriber
In OnFin Copy Trading you can both manage strategies and subscribe to them at the same time. For this purpose you need to open different accounts.
FAQ
Everything you want to know about verification, regulations and legal aspects
We use the technology of secure connections (SSL), which guarantees the confidentiality of user-provided data. SSL-technology provides effective protection of information received from possible interception by third parties. Our company constantly improves the security technologies used to prevent unauthorized entry into the system, as well as to prevent unauthorized access to data.
The verification process takes up to 24 hours. The actual time of consideration depends on the number of applications received.

We do our best to make this process as fast as possible.
No. In order to protect your data, all documents should be uploaded only to My Account.
Upload an image of the two sides of your credit card in the appropriate form in My Account.

Please note that you need to close or retouch using the graphical image editor all the numbers that are located between the 6 first and 4 last digits in the front image of a bank card. In turn, on the back image of a credit card, similarly close or retouch the CVV / CVC code. All other data on both sides of the card must be open.
To change the data, please contact our support team support@onfin.io

Risk Warning: Trading foreign exchange on margin carries a high level of risk and may not be suitable for all investors. There is a possibility that you may sustain a loss equal to or greater than your entire investment. Therefore, you should not invest or risk money that you cannot afford to lose. Before using OnFin Ltd services, please acknowledge all of the risks associated with trading.

OnFin does not provide services in Russia (RF), does not advertise its services and products, and does not encourage registration on its website by residents of RF. Please note that OnFin does not operate in the United States, Seychelles, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, Japan, Spain, Italy, France, Germany, Portugal, Denmark, Estonia, Slovenia, Greece, Malaysia, and the Russian Federation.
